description: Chrome extensions parser walks Extensions directory and emits BrowserEvent per installed extension
steps: Walk immediate subdirs of extensions_dir (each is an extension ID)
For each extension ID dir, find the highest-version subdirectory (sort by dir name, take last)
Extract: name, version, description, permissions array
Use manifest.json file mtime as timestamp (or 0 if unavailable)
Description: '{name} v{version}'. Attrs: name, version, id, description
Test factory: create TempDir, create Extensions/<id>/<version>/manifest.json with known content
Test: parse_empty_extensions_dir — no subdirs yields empty vec
Test: parse_single_extension — attrs[name] and attrs[version] correct
Test: parse_highest_version_only — two version dirs, only latest manifest name is used
